---
title: "Jointures"
author: "Lylia"
date: "2026-05-09"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r}
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(tmap)
```

# Lecture des données

```{r}
iris <- st_read("data/iris.shp")

revenus <- st_read("data/revenus.gpkg")
```

# Filtrage Saint-Denis

```{r}
iris_sd <- iris[
  iris$Nom_Officie.7 == "['Saint-Denis']",
]
```

# Reprojection

```{r}
revenus <- st_transform(
  revenus,
  st_crs(iris_sd)
)
```

# Jointure spatiale

```{r}
jointure <- st_join(
  iris_sd,
  revenus
)
```

# Carte

```{r}
plot(st_geometry(jointure))
```
